prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle building with caloric surplus for strength training

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner) plus snacks
Protein distributed across meals with minimum 30g per meal
Total daily calories support muscle-building surplus (approximately 3000-3200 kcal)
Plan is concise and formatted for quick daily reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing elevated protein distribution and caloric surplus for muscle building

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain weight and performance for competition while meeting strict 1,800 calorie daily limit
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, no nuts due to allergy

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 1,800 calories across all meals
Includes at least 100g of protein distributed throughout the day to support muscle recovery
All meals are vegetarian and nut-free
Plan is concise and formatted for a single day with clear meal times
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport with specific weight management needs (gymnast or boxer) requiring balanced nutrition within strict caloric constraints while maintaining performance

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high carbohydrate intake and strategic meal timing around a 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and pre/post-workout meals
Pre-run meal is light and carbohydrate-focused; post-run meal includes carbohydrates and protein for recovery
Total daily calories and macronutrients are appropriate for an endurance athlete in training
All meals comply with vegetarian diet and nut-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions
